ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Harbor FR #159 identity environment consistency facts covering #169/#170/#171/#172.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Harbor repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only CloakBrowser-Manager, CloakBrowser, Donut Browser, and research source locators outside Harbor.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Harbor runtime-api identity consistency files and HARBOR-169 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No real browser launch beyond fixture smoke
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, or profile storage material
No CAPTCHA/2FA or risk bypass promise
No merge, issue closeout, or GitHub dependency graph edit
validation_expectation: sensitive material check against smoke output
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #159 #169 #170 #171 #172 and final execution-subagent report to the scheduler thread.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Harbor runtime-api identity consistency files and HARBOR-169 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Lode, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, issue closeout, or GitHub dependency graph edit actions.

ownership_constraints_detail.external_action_boundary: No live account, browser profile, credential, cookie/token, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, merge, issue closeout, or GitHub dependency graph edit actions.

integration_evidence: Identity consistency facts are integrated into runtime-api exports and HarborRuntime.getIdentityConsistencyFacts.

Facts summarize CloakBrowser primary provider posture, official Chrome restricted fallback limits, excluded Chromium/Donut provider policy, resource satisfaction, drift, login state, risk states, readiness, and public consumer boundaries.
Runtime smoke emits identityConsistency fixture facts and asserts schema, resource coverage, readiness, risk state, and no protected endpoint/material exposure.
node:test coverage verifies ready CloakBrowser, Chrome fallback conflict, proxy/timezone drift, missing login state, site block risk, no-bypass limitation text, and sensitive material exclusion.

Validation passed on 2026-07-06T08:21Z: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test with 22 tests, pnpm smoke:runtime, sensitive material check, git diff --check, loom fact-chain, loom verify, loom suite validate, loom suite carrier validate, loom suite evidence validate.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: Bounded Runtime API facts/fixture slice with no persistent storage migration, no real browser launch in default smoke, no external account/profile material, no cross-repo schema publication, and no hosted/runtime write behavior.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: App/Core/Lode receive public facts, refs, capability limits, readiness states, and blocking reasons only; cookies, tokens, credentials, raw storage, raw CDP/VNC endpoints, raw DOM/network, and platform-private detection strategy are not exposed.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite before adding persistent identity consistency storage, real provider environment validation, live account login checks, cross-repo schema publication, external visible site actions, hosted/cloud runtime, or write-side runtime behavior.
